title: UIC historian Jane Rhodes elected to the American Antiquarian Society
summary_en: Rhodes was recognized for her outstanding contributions to academic and public life.

title: Neuropsychiatric Institute facade restoration project nears completion
summary_en: Restoration work at the historic site is expected to be completed in July.
title_cn: 神经精神病学研究院外立面修复项目即将竣工

title: UIC celebrates 2026 spring commencement May 6-9
summary_en: Chicago’s largest public university to award about 6,600 degrees.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校将于5月6日至9日举办2026年春季毕业典礼

summary_en: The grade recognizes UI Health for commitment to patient safety.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学医疗健康系统获评跳蛙集团医院安全等级A级

title: How 3 exceptional spring grads made their mark at UIC

title_cn: 三名杰出春季毕业生是如何在伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校取得突出成绩的

title_cn: 玛格丽塔·阿朗戈：将学术优势转化为公共影响力

title_cn: 北京师范大学－香港浸会大学联合国际学院学生为住宅博物馆档案馆补充的馆藏内容

title: Emily Manzo: Leading with purpose and vision
summary_en: Urban education senior helped restart campus powwow, bringing together UIC’s Native American community.
title_cn: 埃米莉·曼佐：秉持宗旨 远见领航

title: Big Brothers Big Sisters linked to lower violence and substance use among youth

title_cn: 大哥哥大姐姐计划与青少年暴力行为及物质滥用发生率降低相关
